title: Brine-Wet Bitter Filipino Broccoli Stew
description: A satvik-friendly, single-pot broccoli stew with a brine-infused base, bright citrus, and a touch of fiery chili.

ingredients.name: brine water
ingredients.notes: salted water from a homemade brine

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger and sauté for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in the vegetable broth and brine water, then bring to a gentle simmer.
Add the chopped broccoli florets and stir to combine.
Stir in the coconut aminos, lemon juice, turmeric powder, and chili flakes.
Cover the pot and let the stew simmer for 15 minutes, or until the broccoli is tender yet springy.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, adding more chili flakes for extra heat if desired.
Serve hot, garnished with a squeeze of fresh lemon if desired.
